summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Turkish Label Management System. All core features working correctly including dashboard KPIs, product CRUD operations, label preparation with TANEX TW-2024 format, and settings management.

design_issues.issue: Label preview may not be updating live with brand name changes
Mobile menu button not found in responsive design

passed_tests: Sidebar navigation works for all pages
Products page loads with search and table
Add new product via sheet form
Label Prep page auto-fill from product code
Label Prep A4 preview with TANEX format
Settings page loads with all inputs
Complete navigation flow between all pages
